title: Melissitus late-alatus

This genus belongs to the order Hymenoptera and is further classified under the class Insecta. The classification of Melissitus late-alatus can be broken down into its taxonomy as follows: Kingdom Animalia, Phylum Arthropoda, Class Insecta, Order Hymenoptera, Family Crabronidae, Genus Melissitus. Melissitus late-alatus is a specific genus within this order, characterized by its unique characteristics and habits.
